title: The Remarkable Mr. Kipps
writer: H.G. Wells, Sidney Gilliat, Frank Launder
actors: Michael Redgrave, Phyllis Calvert, Philip Frost
plot: Kipps, the draper's apprentice, falls in love with a girl above his station. After he unexpectedly inherits a fortune, he thinks his dream has come true. But money can't make him a gentleman, or bring him the girl he really wants.
